commands.review_summary:
The PR adds focused gateway usage.cost aggregation regression coverage and changes Control UI date-only label parsing to use local calendar dates with invalid-date rollover checks.

PR surface: Source +11, Tests +116. Total +127 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main constructs date-only usage labels from UTC midnight before local formatting, which can display the previous calendar day west of UTC. The original multi-agent aggregation mismatch is already addressed on current main, and this PR adds regression coverage for that explicit all-agent contract.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blocker is a PR body or maintainer metadata edit to prevent unintended issue closure; there is no branch code repair finding for ClawSweeper to implement.

target.title: fix(gateway): repair usage cost aggregation across agents
target.body:
## Summary
- Repair #70205 after rebasing onto current main 2e240e772b83aac54544e172c3ed81a2488ddde7.
- Preserve main's explicit API contract: Control UI sends agentScope:"all" when no agent is selected, and omitted agentId must not silently broaden gateway usage.cost.
- Keep the still-relevant user-facing fixes narrow: usage date-only labels must not backshift west of UTC, and any retained all-agent aggregation hardening must keep review-bot findings resolved.

## Credit
Based on https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/70205 by @luke-skywalker-open-claw / @lmachineone, with earlier aggregation work credited to @stablegenius49 in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/42063.

## Validation
- pnpm -s vitest run src/gateway/server-methods/usage.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/usage.sessions-usage.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/usage.cost-usage-cache.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/usage-metrics.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/usage-metrics.node.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
- Codex /review must pass clean before merge.

Clownfish 🐠 replacement reef notes:
- Cluster: ghcrawl-157040-autonomous-smoke
- Source PRs: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/70205, https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/42063
- Credit: Repair source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/70205 in place and preserve credit for @luke-skywalker-open-claw / @lmachineone.; Carry attribution for @stablegenius49 and source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/42063 as earlier focused all-agent usage.cost aggregation work.; Do not close #13219; it remains the broader native usage-ledger feature request.
- Validation: pnpm -s vitest run src/gateway/server-methods/usage.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/usage.sessions-usage.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/usage.cost-usage-cache.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/usage-metrics.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/usage-metrics.node.test.ts; pnpm check:changed
- Repair fallback: source PR #70205 is a fork branch requiring rebase; use replacement branch because GitHub App pushes to contributor forks can be rejected when rebased upstream history includes workflow files

fish notes: model gpt-5.5, reasoning xhigh; reviewed against 9cdf77461ddc.
